2606.11875.title: I Understand How You Feel: Enhancing Deeper Emotional Support Through Multilingual Emotional Validation in Dialogue System
2606.11875.paper_summary: Emotional validation - explicitly acknowledging that a user's feelings make sense - has proven therapeutic value but has received little computational attention. Emotional validation in dialogue systems can be decomposed into (i) validating response identification, (ii) validation timing detection, and (iii) validating response generation. To support research on all three subtasks, we release M-EDESConv, a 120k English-Japanese multilingual corpus created through hybrid manual and automatic annotation, and M-TESC, a multilingual spoken-dialogue test set. For timing detection, we propose MEGUMI, a Multilingual Emotion-aware Gated Unit for Mutual Integration, that fuses frozen XLM-RoBERTa semantics with language-specific emotion encoders via cross-modal attention and gated fusion. MEGUMI shows superior performance on both the M-EDESConv and M-TESC datasets, both objectively and subjectively. Finally, our EmoValidBench benchmarks of GPT-4.1 Nano and Llama-3.1 8B indicate that current LLMs generate contextually similar and diverse validating responses, but emotional understanding remains a major area for improvement. Project page: https://github.com/zihaurpang/Multilingual-Emotional-Validation
2606.11875.paper_summary_zh: 情感驗證——明確承認用戶的感受是合理的——已被證明具有治療價值，但在計算上卻鮮有關注。對話系統中的情感驗證可以分解為 (i) 驗證回應識別、(ii) 驗證時機檢測，以及 (iii) 驗證回應生成。為了支持對這三個子任務的研究，我們發布了 M-EDESConv，一個包含 120,000 條英日雙語的多語言語料庫，該語料庫是通過混合手動和自動標註創建的，以及 M-TESC，一個多語言口語對話測試集。對於時機檢測，我們提出了 MEGUMI，一種多語言情感感知的門控單元，用於相互整合，它通過跨模態注意力和門控融合將凍結的 XLM-RoBERTa 語義與特定語言的情感編碼器融合。MEGUMI 在 M-EDESConv 和 M-TESC 數據集上均顯示出優越的性能，無論是客觀還是主觀。最後，我們的 EmoValidBench 對 GPT-4.1 Nano 和 Llama-3.1 8B 的基準測試表明，當前的 LLM 生成的驗證回應在上下文上相似且多樣，但情感理解仍然是需要改進的主要領域。項目頁面： https://github.com/zihaurpang/Multilingual-Emotional-Validation
2606.11875.author: Zi Haur Pang et.al.
2606.11875.authors: Zi Haur Pang, Yahui Fu, Koji Inoue, Tatsuya Kawahara
